calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Reset To Mar-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235

Petitioner Xiumei Huang (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Jia Xing Wu and with Cantonese Interpreter: Stella Li. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

The attachement to the petition was without the mailing address for the minor's father in China & father's signature on the petition was not nortorized, and lacks the proof of service on notice, the OSC for change of name of a Minor is continued to March 24, 2011 at 9:00 am in Dept. 514, for the Petitioner to submit proof of service to the minor's father of new OSC hearing date, or for a request to dispensing notice.
